content: {"pass": false, "issues": [{"problem": "Many detailed platform/integration claims (high throughput/low latency, security/privacy features like PII protection and prompt‑injection defenses, scalability to hundreds of millions of requests, specific SDKs and integrations) are not supported by any ledger quote.", "fix": "Remove or soften these implementation/integration details or add ledger items with quotes explicitly mentioning them."}, {"problem": "Specific pricing tier details (Project $30/4,000 credits; Bootstrap $100/15,000; Startup $220/38,000; Growth $500/100,000; free for students; email support on specific plans; per‑credit effective price range $0.0075–$0.005; plan change behavior and proration) are not backed by any ledger quote.", "fix": "Either delete these granular pricing details or add ledger items with exact quotes for each stated price, credit amount, student offer, support level, and proration rule."}, {"problem": "Rate‑limit section (100 RPM dev keys, 1,000 RPM production keys, separate crawl endpoint limits, higher limits on paid plans) is not supported by any ledger quote.", "fix": "Remove the concrete RPM numbers and crawl‑limit statements or add a ledger item quoting the rate‑limits help article."}]}
